name: Chesapeake Institute of Public Health
description: Independent public health research institute serving Baltimore and the Chesapeake region. Focused on environmental health, infectious disease surveillance, and health equity.

name: Meridian Public Health Foundation
description: Foundation funding transformative public health research across the mid-Atlantic. Supports work on health equity, infectious disease, and environmental health.

name: Journal of Urban Health Equity
description: Peer-reviewed journal publishing research on health equity in urban settings.

name: Kensington University
description: Research university. Gerald earned her Ph.D. in Epidemiology here in 2022.
